title: prospoieomai #4364
definition:
1) to take or claim a thing to one's self
 2) to conform one's self to a thing, or rather to affect to one's self
    2a) to pretend
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to take or claim a thing to one's self
 2) to conform one's self to a thing, or rather to affect to one's self
    2a) to pretend

    NASB:  to attach to, take to oneself, hence to pretend:
